entries.source: "Opportunity cost"
entries.value: "संधी खर्च"

entries.source: "Should a company enter this market?"
entries.value: "एखाद्या कंपनीने या market मध्ये प्रवेश करावा का?"

entries.source: "What makes an argument valid?"
entries.value: "युक्तिवाद वैध कशामुळे ठरतो?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Socratic Instruction on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: foundations learning साठी inspir वर Socratic Instruction वापरण्याचा practical guide, prompts, study loops आणि सुरक्षित AI habits सह.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: अधिक मजबूत study loop

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI शिक्षक

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: final answer ऐवजी छोटी पहिली पायरी मागा.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: AI ला फक्त result नव्हे, तुमचे reasoning check करायला सांगा.

entries.source: Build a hypothesis.
entries.value: hypothesis तयार करा.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: memory मधून idea परत लिहून finish करा.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: पायाभूत गोष्टी

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: जे शिकणारे एखाद्या विषयाचा सखोल विचार करू इच्छितात, गृहितकांची चाचणी घेऊ इच्छितात आणि टिकाऊ समज निर्माण करू इच्छितात.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Try करण्यासाठी prompts

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding हा passive answer collection ऐवजी learning साठी AI वापरण्याचा focused मार्ग आहे. हा mode एका specific job भोवती तयार आहे: concept, argument, problem, text किंवा decision ला focused chain of questions मध्ये बदला. तुमचा buddy प्रत्येक answer ऐकतो, assumptions आणि gaps map करतो आणि तुम्हाला तुमच्या own final synthesis कडे ढकलतो. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: Socratic AI शिक्षक साठी Deeper Understanding: practical मार्गदर्शक

entries.source: Socratic Instruction
entries.value: सॉक्रेटीक सूचना

entries.source: Start the live mode at Socratic Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Collaborative Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Socratic Instruction वर live mode सुरू करा. neighboring learning format हवा असल्यास Collaborative Instruction try करा. platform च्या broader view साठी AI learning companion सर्वांसाठी काय करायला हवा ते वाचा.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: तुम्ही काय learn किंवा produce करण्याचा प्रयत्न करत आहात ते mode ला सांगा.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: तो difference flow मध्ये दिसतो. one giant response ऐवजी best sessions loop मधून जातात: goal set करा, काहीतरी try करा, feedback मिळवा, weak spot repair करा आणि next action choose करा.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: तो focus महत्त्वाचा आहे. general chatbot जवळजवळ काहीही answer करू शकतो, पण learning mode conversation ला shape देतो. idea stick व्हायला मदत करणाऱ्या thinking, practice, feedback किंवा exploration कडे तो nudge करतो.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: ट्यूटर एका वेळी एकच प्रश्न विचारतो, तुमच्या तर्काची वाट पाहतो आणि तुम्ही प्रयत्न केल्यानंतरच निष्कर्ष काढतो.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: AI सोबत स्वतःला न फसवता study करण्यामागचीही हीच सवय आहे: learner active ठेवा. AI तुमच्या thinking वर feedback देते तेव्हा ते सर्वात उपयोगी ठरते.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: हा mode विशेषतः त्या learners साठी उपयोगी आहे जे करू इच्छितात:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: step तुमच्या स्वतःच्या शब्दांत try करा.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model.
entries.value: confusion ला स्पष्ट model मध्ये बदला.

entries.source: Use hints before answers.
entries.value: answers आधी hints वापरा.

entries.source: Use Socratic Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Socratic Instruction वापरा जेव्हा तुम्हाला session पटकन सुरू व्हावे पण तरीही ते तुमच्यानुसार adapt व्हावे असे वाटते. पहिले ध्येय प्रभावी वाटणे नाही. पहिले ध्येय पुढचा step शक्य वाटायला लावणे आहे.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: हा mode कशात मदत करतो

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: पुढे कुठे जायचे

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: तुमच्या real problem च्या rough version नेही तुम्ही सुरू करू शकता. messy first prompt ठीक आहे. तुम्ही सुरू केल्यावर session level, audience, deadline आणि style स्पष्ट करू शकते.
